name: distro-contracts
description: EVM smart contracts for distro, deployed to Arc testnet

scripts.deploy:escrow: source .env && forge script script/DeployEscrow.s.sol:DeployEscrow --rpc-url $ARC_RPC_URL --slow --broadcast --verify --verifier blockscout --verifier-url https://testnet.arcscan.app/api/ --verifier-api-key $ARCSCAN_API_KEY
